welcome_wordings.gathering:
Welcome, dear friends and family.
We're so deeply touched to share this special day.
Maren & Elliot Hartwell
Saturday, September 19, 2026
welcome_wordings.ceremony_reception:
Maren & Elliot Hartwell
Saturday, September 19, 2026
We welcome you to a joyful celebration of our marriage.

choices.name: Heirloom Tomato Salad
choices.description: Vine-ripened tomatoes, fresh burrata, basil pesto, balsamic glaze.

choices.name: Butternut Squash Velouté
choices.description: Creamy roasted butternut squash soup with toasted pumpkin seeds.

choices.name: Pan-Seared Halibut
choices.description: Delicate halibut fillet with lemon-dill sauce, asparagus, and saffron risotto.

choices.name: Filet Mignon
choices.description: Tender beef filet, wild mushroom demi-glace, potato gratin, haricots verts.

choices.name: Classic Crème Brûlée
choices.description: Rich vanilla custard with a perfectly caramelized sugar crust.

choices.name: Chocolate Lava Cake
choices.description: Warm, molten chocolate cake with raspberry coulis and fresh berries.

thank_you_message: Our hearts are overflowing with gratitude for celebrating with us. Your love and support mean the world as we begin our journey as husband and wife. Thank you for being a cherished part of our special day.

program.title: The Processional
program.line: Our closest family and wedding party begin the ceremony.

program.title: The Ceremony
program.line: A heartfelt exchange of vows on the South Lawn.

program.title: Cocktail Hour
program.line: Light refreshments and conversation on the Veranda.

program.title: Dinner Service
program.line: A gourmet meal awaits in the Manor Ballroom.

program.title: Toasts & Speeches
program.line: Words of love and well wishes for the newlyweds.

program.title: First Dance
program.line: Maren and Elliot's inaugural dance as husband and wife.

program.title: Dancing & Merriment
program.line: Join us on the dance floor for a night of celebration.

program.title: Last Dance
program.line: One final dance to conclude our beautiful evening together.

signature_drinks.name: The Barnaby
signature_drinks.pet_story: Our sweet Barnaby, always loyal and full of joy, inspires this comforting classic.

signature_drinks.name: The Clementine
signature_drinks.pet_story: Just like Clementine, this drink is bright, a little sassy, and perfectly delightful.
